dos: Use Monument Grotesk 400 for all text elements, ranging from 12px for captions to 72px for display headings.
Apply Canvas White (#ffffff) as the primary page background and for elevated card surfaces, ensuring a clean, bright canvas.
Employ Graphite (#171717) for all primary text and main calls to action, providing strong focal points and clear hierarchy.
Utilize Ash Gray (#e5e7eb) for subtle borders and ghost button outlines to delineate elements without harsh lines.
Round corners with a 9999px radius for all buttons and icons to create a consistent pill-like or circular shape.
Apply a 20px border-radius to all primary content cards, softening their appearance and suggesting approachability.
Always use diffuse, light shadows like rgba(207, 207, 207, 0.01) for elevated cards, maintaining a floating rather than heavy aesthetic.
donts: Avoid using saturated colors other than Warm Gold (#ffc838) for accents; the system is built on a near-monochromatic palette.
Do not deviate from the single 400 weight for Monument Grotesk; visual hierarchy is established through size and color, not varied weight.
Do not use hard, high-contrast shadows; the system favors soft, barely-there elevation effects.
Avoid introducing additional border colors that aren't Ash Gray (#e5e7eb) or Graphite (#171717) to maintain visual consistency.
Do not use sharp 0px border-radii for interactive elements or cards; all prominent components should have rounded corners.
Refrain from bolding text for emphasis; use different font sizes or the Graphite (#171717) color for distinction.
Do not break the established 4px element gap and 24px card padding; these values maintain the comfortable density.

colors.name: Canvas White
colors.role: Primary page canvas and white card surfaces. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

colors.name: Graphite
colors.role: Primary text, headings, and filled primary action buttons — provides strong contrast against light surfaces

colors.name: Ash Gray
colors.role: Subtle borders, dividers, subtle background patterns, and ghost button outlines

colors.name: Boulder
colors.role: Muted body text, helper text, and inactive icon fills

colors.name: Cloud Gray
colors.role: Subtle background shifts, hover states, and very light surface treatments

colors.name: Stone Gray
colors.role: Tertiary text, descriptive labels, and fine print

colors.name: Platinum
colors.role: Placeholder text, disabled states, and decorative icon accents

colors.name: Warm Gold
colors.role: Announcement banners and informational tags — a rare splash of warmth

colors.name: Deep Black
colors.role: Overlays, specific card backgrounds, and fine accent lines; creates depth and separation for content blocks

colors.name: Steel Gray Gradient
colors.role: Subtle background gradients for section headers or decorative elements, implying subtle depth

colors.name: Dark Charcoal Gradient
colors.role: Backgrounds for dark, immersive sections, hinting at premium content or focus areas

similar.why: Monochromatic interface with subtle gradients and a premium, clean aesthetic.
Heavy reliance on typography for hierarchy and a restrained, almost colorless palette for content areas.
Minimalist layout, focus on clarity, and use of very light shadows and rounded corners for UI elements.

surfaces.name: Canvas Background
surfaces.purpose: Dominant page background for the site.

surfaces.name: Base Surface
surfaces.purpose: Primary surface for cards, sections, and interactive elements.

surfaces.name: Subtle Surface
surfaces.purpose: Slightly recessed or highlighted areas; hover states, subtle background differentiation.

surfaces.name: Dark Content Surface
surfaces.purpose: Distinct, immersive content containers for media or specific product modules.

components.name: Text Only Button
components.role: Link-style buttons for navigation and secondary actions.
components.description: Transparent background, text content in Graphite (#171717). No padding or border, relying on typography for definition. Used for header navigation items.

components.name: Pill Primary Button
components.description: Filled with Graphite (#171717) background, Canvas White (#ffffff) text, and a 9999px border-radius creating a pill shape. Padding is 9px vertical, 20px horizontal.

components.name: Pill Inverted Button
components.role: Secondary action or prominent ghost button.
components.description: Filled with Canvas White (#ffffff) background, Graphite (#171717) text, and a 9999px border-radius. Padding is 9px vertical, 16px horizontal. Used for 'Sign in'.

components.name: Elevated Content Card
components.role: Container for featured information or interactive content blocks.
components.description: Canvas White (#ffffff) background with a 20px border-radius. Features a soft, spread-out shadow using rgba(207, 207, 207, 0.01) 0px 132px 53px 0px, making it appear to float subtly. Internal padding is 24px on all sides.

components.name: Dark Embed Card
components.role: Embedded content blocks, often product screenshots or code examples.
components.description: Deep Black (#000000) background with a tight 9px border-radius. No shadow, relying on the dark background for visual distinction. Internal padding is 15.5px on all sides.

components.name: Subtle Highlight Card
components.role: Highlighting related or suggested content with minimal visual weight.
components.description: Background at rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) with a 14px border-radius. No shadow. Internal padding is 6px on all sides. Used for nested or secondary content groupings.

components.name: Announcement Banner
components.description: Background color of Warm Gold (#ffc838). Text and button are Graphite (#171717) and Pill Primary Button style respectively, offering clear call-to-action within the banner.

typography.role: The primary typeface for all text content. Its clean, sans-serif design maintains a modern and authoritative tone. The consistent single weight for all sizes prevents visual clutter and emphasizes the content's inherent importance.

designSystem.description: Compound's design system evokes an architectural blueprint on a white canvas, emphasizing structured clarity and subtle premium detailing. The aesthetic focuses on minimal contrast and an almost monochromatic palette, allowing information and sophisticated typography to dominate. Surfaces typically feature generous radii and extremely light, diffused shadows, creating a sense of quiet elevation rather than stark separation. Interactivity is signaled through nuanced grays and the distinctive use of a nearly black fill for primary actions, providing a sharp, confident anchor within the otherwise restrained visual hierarchy.

customSections.title: Agent Prompt Guide
customSections.content:
Quick Color Reference:
text: #171717
background: #e5e7eb
border: #e5e7eb
accent: #ffc838
primary action: #171717 (filled action)

Example Component Prompts:
1. Create a Primary Action Button: #171717 background, #a0a0a0 text, 9999px radius, compact pill padding. Use this filled treatment for the main CTA.
2. Create an Elevated Content Card: Canvas White (#ffffff) background, 20px border-radius, with the specified subtle shadow. Inside, include a Monument Grotesk 36px heading in Graphite (#171717) and body text in Boulder (#6f6f6f) at 14px.
3. Create a navigation bar: Ash Gray (#e5e7eb) bottom border, with text-only links in Graphite (#171717) for navigation items (e.g., 'Dashboard') and a Pill Inverted Button 'Sign in' (Canvas White #ffffff background, Graphite #171717 text, 9999px radius, 9px vert, 16px horiz padding).
